Subject: Apology for Delay in Payment  

Dear Ms. Yoyo,  

I hope this message finds you well. I would like to apologize for the delay in processing your payment.  

The amount of $6,480 USD has been successfully transferred to the ApoStar IBAN account. I have attached the payment receipt as proof of the transaction.  

Please let me know if you require any further information or assistance.  

Best regards,  
[Your Name]
